description: IDPH: Operating rooms for general surgery minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area; orthopedic and cardiovascular ORs minimum 450 sq ft.
IDPH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft net floor area; two-bed room minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
IDPH: Critical care unit cubicle minimum 200 sq ft clear floor area; 150 sq ft in open ICU layout per bed.
IDPH: Emergency treatment spaces minimum 120 sq ft per space; trauma room minimum 250 sq ft.
IDPH: Patient zone corridors minimum 8 ft clear width; holding/clean corridors minimum 6 ft.
IDPH: Operating rooms require 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure differential, HEPA-filtered supply.
IDPH: New hospitals and major modifications (>$2M) require Illinois Health Facilities and Services Review Board (HFSRB) approval.
citation: Illinois Health Facilities Planning Act — HFSRB Review

description: IDPH: NICU each infant care space minimum 120 sq ft; private room NICU minimum 150 sq ft exclusive of caregiver space.
